name: pdf-merge-pro
author: Pratik Singh Lad
description: A privacy-first PDF merger that runs entirely in your browser

scripts.deploy: npm run build && node scripts/copy-404.js && gh-pages -d dist
scripts.electron:dev: set ELECTRON=true&& set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist-electron/package.json', JSON.stringify({type:'commonjs'}))" && start /B cmd /c "npx vite" && node scripts/wait-for-server.js && electron .
scripts.electron:build: set ELECTRON=true&& tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist-electron/package.json', JSON.stringify({type:'commonjs'}))" && tsc -b && vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.json && rd /s /q release\win-unpacked
scripts.fix-electron: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['electron/main.ts', 'electron/preload.ts'].forEach(f => { if(fs.existsSync(f)) fs.unlinkSync(f); }); fs.rmSync('dist-electron', {recursive:true, force:true});" && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json
